mnemonics: Snowflake branches out like a real snowflake's arms, normalizing dimensions into sub-dimensions.
keyPoints: A normalized version of the star schema.
Dimensions are broken down into multiple related tables.
Reduces data redundancy but can be more complex to query.
commonMistakes: Using it for all scenarios (it adds complexity, a star schema is often better for performance).
Creating over-normalized structures that are difficult to understand and maintain.
